_note: transform.js does not run for webhook plugins. This file is kept as a reference for the webhook payload format.

ac_field_index.8: origin airport label (e.g. LHR) — or 0 if absent
ac_field_index.9: destination airport label — or 0 if absent
ac_field_index.10: aircraft description (e.g. Airbus A320neo) — or 0 if absent
ac_field_index._note_sentinel: Absent optional fields [8]-[10] use 0 (not null). TRMNL strips null from JSON arrays, which would collapse indices and shift every field after the first absent one.

fc_fields.2: cos(feeder_lat * PI/180) — used by template JS for lon projection
